tree.name: Liam McNeeley
tree.tradeDescription: Hornets traded Mark Williams and 2029 2nd (PHO own) to Suns for Liam McNeeley (draft rights, #29 pick), Vasilije Micic, and 2029 1st (least favorable). Phoenix also received a trade exception.
tree.note: UConn wing, drafted 29th overall by Phoenix in 2025 NBA Draft

assetsGivenUp.name: Mark Williams
assetsGivenUp.note: Duke center, Hornets drafted him 15th overall in 2022
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Drafted by Hornets with 15th overall pick in 2022 NBA Draft

assetsGivenUp.name: 2029 2nd Round Pick via PHO
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Hornets traded Nick Richards and 2025 2nd (least favorable) to Suns for Josh Okogie, 2026 2nd (DEN own), 2029 2nd (PHO own), and 2031 2nd (PHO own).
assetsGivenUp.note: Originally PHO own pick. Sent back to PHX in McNeeley trade.

assetsGivenUp.name: Nick Richards
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Hornets traded 2024 2nd (CHO own, #44 Tyler Kolek) to Pelicans for Nick Richards.
assetsGivenUp.note: Kentucky center, acquired on draft night 2020

assetsGivenUp.name: 2024 2nd Round Pick (#44)
assetsGivenUp.note: Hornets' own 2024 2nd-round pick, sent to NOP for Nick Richards
